arts.ttl: Arsenal make Mathys Tel transfer move that opens up Benjamin Sesko dream scenario
arts.sum: If the Gunners were able to reach an agreement with Tel, the winger could be used as a temporary option to bolster the attack at the Emirates Stadium. Arsenal have reportedly reached out to the representatives of Bayern Munich winger Mathys Tel ahead of a last minute deal in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Man City - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: City meanwhile, are unbeaten in their last six Premier League games after an upturn in form following a difficult start to the season. Here, football.london provides you the information on how watch the Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man City LIVE: Team news and line-ups from huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: The Gunners must win if they hope to challenge for the title with City regaining their form

arts.ttl: 'My advice': Harry Kane sends message to Mathys Tel amid Manchester United and Arsenal links

arts.sum: Manchester City will look to seal a third consecutive win in the Premier League when they take on rivals Arsenal away from home

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta blocks exit of Arsenal star in final moments of the transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal have failed to strengthen the squad in the January transfer window. They were expected to sign a new striker to lead their attack as that has been the position where they have lacked firepower this season. The Gunners are behind Liverpool in the race to win the Premier League title and they were widely […] The post Mikel Arteta blocks exit of Arsenal star in final moments of the transfer window appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, PSG and Bayern urged to end Visit Rwanda deals
arts.sum: DR Congo calls on Arsenal, PSG and Bayern Munich to end their “blood stained” sponsorship deals with Visit Rwanda amid a worsening humanitarian crisis in the country.

arts.ttl: Man Utd battle Arsenal as Mathys Tel makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both “in contact” with Mathys Tel as they look to complete a late deal for the Bayern Munich forward. The France U21 international has reportedly decided to leave the Allianz Arena before the January transfer window slams shut, and Arsenal and Man Utd are deemed to be the frontrunners in the race for his signature.

arts.ttl: I was fuming after Man City exit - now I'm hoping to prove Pep Guardiola wrong at Arsenal - football.london
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling could come up against Manchester City for the seventh time since his bitter departure when Arsenal face Pep Guardiola's side at the Emirates on Sunday. However, Sterling left City for Chelsea in July 2022 after growing frustrated with his game time under Guardiola.
